## Summary
<!-- What does this PR change? Reference issues with `Fixes #123` or `Refs #123`. -->
## Type of change
- [ ] feat — new functionality
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] refactor — code reshape without behavior change
- [ ] test — adds or improves tests
- [ ] chore — tooling / build / CI
## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project''s style (`cargo fmt`, `cargo clippy -- -D warnings`, `vue-tsc --noEmit`).
- [ ] I added or updated tests where appropriate.
- [ ] I updated relevant documents in `plans/` if my change affects direction.
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `## [Unreleased]`.
- [ ] CI is green.
